changeLogMessages: Fixed issue where calling `UploadPart` with an unseekable stream and `DisablePayloadSigning` set to true would fail (https://github.com/aws/aws-sdk-net/issues/4010). If the stream reports its length it is used directly (capped at `PartSize` when one is set); `PartSize` is only required for a forward-only stream that cannot report its length.
